note: Product category source for Garmin aviation systems, including navigation, radios, autopilots, flight displays, and related services.

title: Gadgetbridge
note: Open source wearable-management alternative that reduces reliance on vendor applications and documents Garmin protocol work.

title: OpenTracksApp
note: Open source privacy-focused sport tracking app used as an alternative for local-first activity tracking.

note: Open source autopilot project relevant to decentralized flight-control and avionics replacement concepts.

note: Open source flight-control software project for drones and unmanned vehicles.

note: Public source repository for PX4 Autopilot.
